title: calophyllum thorelii
intro: Calophyllum thorelii, also known as the Thai cedar or Calophyllum tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum thorelii include pain relief, wound healing, and protection against infections, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and seeds are used to create extracts and oils that can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
